case_title: HOMAYOON PEJOOH VS. NORMA WEISSMAN et al

docket_entries.description: ARBITRATOR RONALD HOBSON WECHT APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION DEC-27-2004 THROUGH MAR-27-2005.

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON JUN-10-2005 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212. FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED MAY-03-2005 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEJOOH, HOMAYOON ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 1.0 DAYS
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR DEC-27-2004. DEC-03-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-03-2005 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR RONALD H. WECHT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY DEFENDANT WEISSMAN, NORMA AS TO PLAINTIFF PEJOOH, HOMAYOON
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WEISSMAN, NORMA
DEMAND FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY DEFENDANT WEISSMAN, NORMA
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUN-10-2005, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEJOOH, HOMAYOON AS TO DEFENDANT WEISSMAN, NORMA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-03-2004 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-04-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-18-2004

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEJOOH, HOMAYOON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEISSMAN, NORMA $4,715.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,715.00, AND PREJUDGMENT INTEREST AT 10% BEGINNING 2/20/04. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE: AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF-SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
